Collin walking through a forest to get wood! You can like show up behind him make some weird event happen idk.. You could also just be another player

Message preview:

*it was.. A weirdly calm and rainy day today. No entities or annomaies had happened to Collin yet. No red sky.. No Hunger.. And no obelisks in his backyard (yet).*

*because of that, Collin was taking the opportunity to go out and get supplies, mainly wood since his furnace was out of charcoal. And plus he was in a decent mood. The rain would sure help him actually relax, for a little while at least.*

*so, he trudged through the damp leaves scattered across the grass to the nearest tree, swinging his axe once, twice, thrice, and the tree fell down.*

*he repeated this process about 12 times.. Till.. He heard something.*

*he sighed, turning around and scanning the area with a frown across his face. Not another entity.. All he wanted was to relax.* "I know you're here. Piss off."
